views.title: CCDNS
views.subtitle: Instant DNS switching via Control Center

views.markdown:
# CCDNS

Native DNS switching directly from Control Center.

CCDNS lets you instantly apply DNS profiles without opening Settings.

---

## Features

- Native Control Center module
- Instant DNS switching
- Profile-based system
- Rootless support
- Lightweight and fast
- iOS 16 optimized

---

## Compatibility

- iOS 16+
- Rootless jailbreaks
- palera1n
- Dopamine
- Roothide support

---

## Developer

Created by lilnynho
